---
title: "compose_velocity"
generated: true
description: "Baker-Campbell-Hausdorff composition of stationary velocity fields."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.deformation`](../nitrix-geometry-deformation.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:compose_velocity -->
```python
compose_velocity(v: Float[Array, '*spatial ndim'], u: Float[Array, '*spatial ndim'], *, order: int = 1) -> Float[Array, '*spatial ndim']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:compose_velocity -->
Baker-Campbell-Hausdorff composition of stationary velocity fields.

Approximates the velocity $z$ for which
$\exp(z) \approx \exp(v) \circ \exp(u)$:

- `order == 1` -- $z = v + u$ (the standard additive log-domain
  update; exact when the fields commute).
- `order == 2` -- $z = v + u + \tfrac{1}{2} [v, u]$ (the first
  Baker-Campbell-Hausdorff correction).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:compose_velocity -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `v` | `Float` | `*spatial` × `ndim` | — | Stationary velocity fields to compose, `(*spatial, ndim)`. The result approximates the velocity of the exponential $\exp(v) \circ \exp(u)$. |
| `u` | `Float` | `*spatial` × `ndim` | — | Stationary velocity fields to compose, `(*spatial, ndim)`. The result approximates the velocity of the exponential $\exp(v) \circ \exp(u)$. |
| `order` | `int` | — | `1` | Order of the Baker-Campbell-Hausdorff expansion: `1` (default) for the plain additive update most diffeomorphic-demons implementations use, or `2` to add half the Lie bracket. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial` × `ndim`. The composed stationary velocity field $z$, `(*spatial, ndim)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:compose_velocity -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
